name: phdata
description: phData's catalog of coding-agent extensions: plugins packaging phData Toolkit CLI workflows (setup, datasource connection, pipeline generation) as skills, preflight scripts, and hooks.

plugins.name: toolkit-core
plugins.description: phData Toolkit CLI foundation: install, PATH setup, project init, JDBC connection/datasource configuration

plugins.name: toolkit-pipeline
plugins.description: Dataspec-driven pipeline generation via toolkit agent discovery and pipeline-build: SQL, dbt, or PySpark transforms plus tests and a datagen spec
